meaning: adj.闷热的,粗暴的,激烈的,放荡的
examples: The climax came one sultry August evening.
The outside air was heavy and moist and sultry.
On a sultry afternoon, I have loose bowels.
On a recent sultry afternoon in Chicago Wiviott made his case for his hometown.
With Rilo Kiley's Under the Blacklight, Lewis sounds more sultry and seductive than ever before.
